description: Tekion is an AI-native, cloud-based automotive retail platform connecting OEMs, dealers, and consumers into one modern ecosystem. The platform powers sales, service, CRM, operations, and digital retail experiences at scale.
responsibilities: Led major performance initiatives that improved application speed by up to 90% across high-traffic customer-facing products.
Designed and delivered Custom Fields architecture across frontend and backend systems, enabling scalable business configuration for enterprise customers.
Led the frontend engineering of a complex Workflow Engine product featuring dynamic UI rendering, interactive logic systems, and high-performance state updates.
Built reusable packaged applications and internal modules distributed through Tekion’s internal registry for faster product development.
Owned architecture decisions, mentored engineers, reviewed code, and improved engineering quality across multiple teams.
Mentored UI interns from beginner to advanced level, helping accelerate onboarding and practical engineering skills.
Delivered cross-team platform integrations and reusable solutions consumed by multiple internal product teams.

description: FusionCharts helps teams transform complex data into clear, interactive, and visually rich dashboards, charts, and reporting experiences used by businesses worldwide.
responsibilities: Led frontend architecture modernization of FusionCharts web applications by migrating legacy PHP systems to Node.js with Vue.js SSR.
Achieved major improvements in performance, SEO, accessibility, maintainability, and browser compatibility across core products.
Designed and built a reusable Design System from scratch, enabling consistency across products and faster collaboration between design and engineering teams.
Built visual regression systems to compare old and new UI states, ensuring pixel-perfect releases and safer deployments.
Contributed to Fusion Store, an internal chart playground similar to JSFiddle for creating, testing, and storing chart configurations.
Collaborated closely with product, design, and engineering teams to improve developer workflows and customer experience.
